description: We include a minimal working example (pseudocode with parameter N=10^6) and formal verification: code is provided which exhaustively enumerates all reduced fractions with denominators <= 10^6, checks Zaremba admissibility, and outputs a reproducible hash of per-chunk bitsets. For the full range d <= 2.1×10^11, the SHA256 hash of the concatenated per-chunk bitsets is 9b4717c2836ad6a3c9431057f3eb0fab8ddfd417838eb1cdf1beae417c8b6b85, computed independently on two nodes.
